Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey! No slackin', put your heart into it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You'll never beat Hayase with that attitude![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You're almost there! Keep up the pace![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}This is our year! Hayase's got nothing on us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Keep it up! You might be able to win the whole thing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}That's the fastest time on the team! Good luck tomorrow—you got this![n]{f 1 1}
